title: Feedback - new tab in Menu list
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app menu does not include a Feedback tab when hamburger icon is tapped
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (top left corner) to open the side menu.
3. Verify that a "Feedback" tab is present in the menu list.
expected: The side menu displays a "Feedback" tab in the menu list.
